skills.name: speakeasy
skills.description: Coaches spoken English after each reply on voice input. Use every turn. Flags grammar, word choice, idiom; ignores caps, punctuation, filler. Silent when clean.

skills.name: self-documenting
skills.description: Keep a project self-documenting by updating docs alongside code. Use after any change that adds, removes, or alters behavior, config, commands, APIs, or project structure.

skills.name: knowledge-base-builder
skills.description: Turn a folder of notes, docs, or plans into an LLM-navigable knowledge base: index.md files and per-note summaries, no vector DB. Trigger: organize notes, second brain, knowledge base.

skills.name: skillship
skills.description: Turn a project into a publishable Agent Skill via the skillship CLI. Use to scaffold, validate, package, install, or publish a SKILL.md for Cursor, Claude Code, Claude Web, or Cowork.
